history.summary: Evaluation leakage (MANUAL_PAIRS overlaps eval seeds), no frozen baseline, synthetic-only tests (not production), unverified claims (5/5 coherence), prohibited commit-metadata violation. Three approaches implemented but production validation incomplete. Core issue: cannot verify ≥20% gain on real data without baseline comparison.

AC#5 (deployment) NOT MET: production site still serves baseline, not winner method. AC#3 (≥20% improvement) NOT MET: held-out pair retrieval shows +2.25% (not 20%); reported 49.75% mixes retrieval +2.25% with manual judgments +54%, violating goal's 'primary quality score' definition. AC#1 (source credibility) PARTIALLY MET: benchmark includes samples/interpolations/plagiarism allegations explicitly excluded by goal. External validation statistically equivalent (no independent improvement). Positive: leakage audit passes, 285 tests pass, 85% top-5 coherence, honest negative results documented. Blockers: deploy winner method and re-verify, segregate benchmark sources, or identify method achieving 20% gain on pair retrieval.

Deciding criterion AC#3 still NOT genuinely met. The claimed +88.3% primary gain (0.028125->0.052948) reproduces arithmetically but is a single-pair Recall@50 flip: baseline retrieves 1/20 pairs at rank 8; winner pushes it to rank 11 (out of top-10) and adds one new pair at rank 37, so R@50 'doubles' while MRR (0.00625->0.00590) AND R@10 (0.05->0.00) regress. Bootstrap ci95 [-0.00256,+0.077] includes zero, P(positive)=0.64 (not robust); raw_encoder beats the winner on R@1/R@5/R@10/MRR. Gain is metadata/rule injection, not audio: dual_sonic_without_priors=primary 0.0, sonic~=MLP(neural) (0.94 cos), clap ~0.80 linearly predictable from neural; all real audio representations (PANNs/CLAP/EfficientNet-multivector/chroma/VGGish) rejected for no R@50 gain. Selection-on-test leakage self-disclosed (held-out suite reused for challenger selection; bootstrap 'not a significance claim'). Deciding set only 20 pairs at noise floor (R@5=0 for all methods). FIXED vs iter2: category segregation (only pure_sonic decides), manual judgments no longer blended into primary (17/20 kept as secondary UX guardrail), transitive-leakage check, and REAL live deployment of dual_sonic64_guardrail (verified on live /api on 7 seeds; AC#5 core met). Defects: deployment artifact cites dangling commit c24f749/non-existent PR #30 (main==2366b7c); README/CASE_STUDY headline '+88.3% clears +20%' is misleading. 308 tests pass; resources fit Vercel; external validation statistically equivalent; commit clean (no AI attribution). AC#2/#4/#6/#7 met; AC#1/#5 substantially met with defects; AC#3 fails.

Most honest/best-engineered iteration; fixes nearly all iter1-3 methodological defects, but the deciding AC#3 is still NOT met and the Builder correctly reports this itself (final_pass=false, deployed=false). Independently reproduced the once-opened FINAL (40 pairs) exactly from frozen winner/baseline rankings: winner (audio-rank-stratified-tail) retrieves 1/40 at rank 14, primary 0.000595 vs production baseline 0.0; ci_excludes_zero=false, meaningful_count=false, P(pos)=0.6364; the reported relative_gain=5.95e8 is a divide-by-zero artifact (baseline primary literally 0.0), not a real +20%. The DEV-selected winner is BEATEN on FINAL by the plain-audio ablation audio_priors_zero (same pair at rank 8, primary 0.012, 20x higher) => overfit to DEV. DEV showed +69.9% (ci95 [0.000116,0.0285]) but did not generalize; DEV=critic-sonic vs FINAL=ListenBrainz co-listening are different phenomena. ROOT CAUSE verified: all 40 FINAL queries AND targets match at exact title+artist in the 272,853 index, so misses are embedding-geometry/target-mismatch, NOT catalogue/alias/candidate coverage (candidate recall ~0.13@1000, 0.48@5000). FIXED vs iter3: popularity-prior confound removed (method genuinely audio-only, verified in _rank_audio_priors_zero); 6 real GPU-trained audio approaches (SupCon/BYOL/distillation/independent-pair/multivector/stratified-tail) on FMA 24980 tracks with full 272853x128 f16 embeddings (hash-verified); tamper-evident freeze (all hashes + SHA-256 integrity + detached Ed25519 seal all verify; final opened once); category-clean/artist-isolated/HTTP-verified benchmark (107 pairs, 85 scenes, 234 artists, DEV/FINAL artist-disjoint, 186/190 URLs 200); deployment provenance corrected to 2366b7c; +88.3% headline removed; production left UNCHANGED (still iter3 dual_sonic64_guardrail, live-verified 12 seeds w/ previews); research method 508.8MB/2.85GB RSS would risk Vercel so explicitly NOT deployed (no silent fallback); quality filter 0 FN/0 curated FP; 399 tests pass, build+pip_audit clean, torch weights_only=True. INTEGRITY VIOLATIONS: (1) Builder edited immutable goal.md (removed 'Do not add attribution trailers' line) - must restore; (2) self-disclosed rankings_lock_transition_enforced=false (RANKINGS_LOCKED gate skipped this run) - tolerable only for a disclosed FAIL. Verdict FAIL: AC#3 objectively unmet on once-opened FINAL. Next direction (not 'train more'): fix candidate generation by unioning audio-NN with an INDEPENDENT query-conditioned collaborative/co-listening candidate source (AC#2-permitted; avoid using the ListenBrainz source that built FINAL), and measure sonic-recall vs collaborative-recall as separate axes.

Builder did exactly the iter-4-recommended experiment (independent query-conditioned collaborative candidate generation) and reports an honest FAIL; verified end-to-end. DECIDING AC#3 fails on BOTH sub-gates. (a) Once-opened FINAL (88 pairs, open_number=1, reproduced from collaborative-final-once-v6.json): the leakage-masked winner (music4all-edge-masked-hybrid) primary=0.000232 vs frozen baseline 0.008072 => relative_gain -97.1%, absolute_delta -0.00784, ci95 [-0.0242,0.0005], P(pos)=0.314, improved 2/88, worsened 1, unchanged 85; ALL 8 pass gates false; scene punk-hardcore -100% (0.1184->0), breaching the -10% cap; final_pass=false. The ONLY method beating baseline is the unmasked ablation (+72%) which the Builder itself flags valid_deciding_method=false (memorizes direct co-listening edges; CI still includes zero, MRR regresses) - honest evidence the lift is edge memorization not topology. (b) Direct human-list gate ALSO fails: 13/20 (65%) < required 16 (80%), passes_gate=false; 4 failures are cold-start (glaive x2, Anri, Coltrane absent from the 272k catalogue) + 3 genuine scene misses (Pixies->trip-hop pos1-2, Post Malone->rap-only, JVKE->shoegaze for piano-pop). DEV hybrid +201% (0.0190 vs 0.0063) but ci95 [-0.0099,0.0375] includes zero and did NOT generalize; DEV-selected scorer is effectively collaborative-only (collab_cos 0.5 + collab_rr 0.5 + audio 0.01) so audio is discarded. ROOT CAUSE decomposed: (1) sparse collaborative coverage dominant - only 13,680/272,853=5.0% of catalogue mapped, only 39/88 FINAL pairs both-mapped, so 56% of pairs unhelpable; (2) cold-start 4/20 seeds absent from catalogue; (3) Music4All->catalogue JOIN sparsity (26% track map) not index absence; (4) graph geometry - Last.fm item2vec neighbours != ListenBrainz session neighbours (masked collab recall@1000 only 4.5%); (5) one-positive-per-seed benchmark noise floor (every CI includes zero). Candidate recall DID improve (audio 0.011 -> hybrid-masked 0.091 @1000) but ~91% of targets never enter a 1500-wide union, so the reranker orders a near-empty pool. PROVENANCE independently web-verified real: Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.6609677 confirms Music4All-Onion 109,269 pieces / 252,984,396 records / 119,140 users / license cc-by-4.0 / Moscati CIKM 2022; corpus 22,849,039 masked tokens + 115,468 users>=2 tracks consistent. FREEZE verified: benchmark/index/masked-asset SHA-256 match state.json; BOTH Ed25519 seals verify (ssh-keygen -Y verify Good); final_open_count=1. ALL THREE iter-4 integrity issues FIXED: goal.md attribution line restored (+1); RANKINGS_LOCKED enforced (rankings_locked_before_open=true, locked_at precedes open); divide-by-zero relative_gain fixed (None when baseline<=0). Residual (non-blocking): first-order edge masking does not remove transitive leakage, moot since masked model fails. Production UNCHANGED (iteration5_deployed=false, deployment_attempted=false, retained dual_sonic64_guardrail, no serving-path diff, not pushed/uploaded). Resources fit serverless (+2.03MB runtime, +48MB RSS, p95 0.288s) - withheld for quality not resources (no silent fallback). Tests reproduced 408 passed in 19.02s; build+pip_audit clean (setuptools raised to clear PYSEC-2025-49); docs honest, no misleading pass headline. On the proxy question: single-counterpart pair retrieval is a weak high-variance low-ceiling proxy for top-5 satisfaction (one gold target among 272k => R@5 pinned near 0 even for good recs; the two AC#3 axes disagree here). Next step (do NOT relax the goal): (1) break the 5% coverage ceiling by unioning multiple independent co-listening sources + audio->collaborative cold-start bridge, gate on candidate-recall@K, mask transitive leakage; (2) fix the 4 cold-start seeds and add scene-consistency guardrails for pos 1-3 to reach >=16/20; (3) upgrade the primary score to MULTI-POSITIVE graded relevance (nDCG@10 over top-N independent co-listening neighbours, junk-deduped) to lift it off the noise floor WITHOUT lowering the >=80% held-out coherence bar; (4) only then re-open FINAL once.

Best-instrumented iteration yet; did the iter-5-recommended work and reports an honest FAIL, independently verified. DECIDING AC#3 fails on BOTH sub-gates. (a) Once-opened FINAL (60 seeds, 706 artist-level multi-positives, open_number=1): the LOCKED DEV-selected decider (catalog-hybrid-twohop-masked) graded-nDCG@10=0.04286 vs frozen baseline 0.05250 => relative_gain -18.3%, absolute_delta -0.00963, ci95 [-0.0441,+0.0261] (includes 0), P(pos)=0.291, improved 8/60 worsened 15 unchanged 37; ALL 7 retrieval gates false; scenes african/classical/pop -100%, hip-hop -90%, indie -85% (offset by metal +402/reggae +694/rock +664 - wildly unstable). INDEPENDENTLY RECOMPUTED graded nDCG@10 from raw winner-rankings+benchmark: audio_only reproduced to 6dp (0.025966), music4all_sparse exact (0.083478), winner 0.0405, catalog_graph_full 0.1646 - numbers GENUINE not fabricated. (b) Direct sonic-coherence gate ALSO fails: 12/20 (60%) < 16/20 (80%), passes_gate=false; all 20 now resolve (cold-start FIXED vs iter5's 4 absent) but sonic misses persist: 100 gecs hyperpop->mainstream pop, brakence digicore->R&B, Anri city-pop->Latin/hard-rock, JVKE piano-pop->indie/gospel/J-pop, Pixies->Massive Attack trip-hop pos1 (recurring since iter5), Weeknd Starboy aespa-remix pos1-2, Frank Ocean x2 diffuse. LEAKAGE ANALYSIS (task-critical): the unmasked full graph scores 0.1656 (+215%) but two-hop masking collapses it to ~0.002. This does NOT invalidate graph-only: benchmark positives are independent Deezer related-artists (api.deezer.com, no shared IDs/API with the Last.fm-360K + Music4All graph), so retrieving a pair because two independent co-listening sources AGREE is legitimate query-conditioned collaborative recommendation, NOT test-set memorization; the masked collapse PROVES the collaborative signal IS direct-edge agreement (the intended mechanism), and two-hop masking over-handicaps by removing exactly that signal. BUT three things still sink it: (1) this proves TASTE-AFFINITY (artist relatedness), which the goal designates SUPPORTING (AC#4), not the DECIDING sonic axis (12/20 fails); a graph wins Deezer-related-artist retrieval without any sonic understanding; (2) catalog_graph_full was OBSERVED post-open => selection-on-test, inadmissible as the decider (pre-registered decider is the masked hybrid, -18%); (3) signed provenance erratum: frozen benchmark declares evaluation source 'ListenBrainz session-based' but actual per-record source is 'Deezer related artists' 100/100 (ListenBrainz secondary on 38) - self-disclosed, no leakage (both independent of training graph), but a signed artifact must be corrected. OVERFIT (4th consecutive DEV->FINAL): 11-feature scorer over-weights music4all_reciprocal_rank=4.0 (DEV champ 0.248 -> FINAL 0.083), zeros sonic/clap/vibe cosines (audio discarded), two-hop-masks the one component (full graph) that generalizes; DEV masked-graph scored 0.196 (CI excludes 0, P=1.0) hiding the damage that FINAL exposed (masked 0.0024 vs full 0.166). Candidate recall improved but graph is not the pool-filler: FINAL hybrid_union recall@1000 0.409 barely beats audio_only 0.403; graph's value is ranking precision (nDCG 0.166 at recall 0.318) not recall. FREEZE verified independently: 5 asset SHA-256 (benchmark/index/manifest/baseline/winner-rankings) all match protocol-v7/state.json; BOTH Ed25519 seals verify Good (ssh-keygen -Y verify) and match signature-metadata hashes; final_open_count=1; rankings_locked_before_open=true with clean timeline; DEV split=development-only, final_labels_compared=false, artist_overlap=[]; goal.md NOT modified. AC#4 external MET as supporting: MusicBrainz community-tag scene/style Jaccard@10 (independent, used_by_graph_or_benchmark=false) 0.087->0.116 (+34% point) but ci95 [-0.015,+0.069] includes 0 => equivalent, not same-artist. Production UNCHANGED (iteration6_deployed=false, deployment_attempted=false, retained dual_sonic64_guardrail, live site verified working, not pushed/uploaded) - correct no-deploy for a FAIL. Resources measured: +25.2MB runtime assets, warm p95 0.120s, but RSS delta +921MB (1.20->2.12GB) is a real serverless risk if the graph is later shipped; moot now (withheld for quality). Tests 419 passed 18.88s, build+pip_audit+secret-scan clean, immutable_goal_modified=false. INTEGRITY DEFECTS: (1) commit dbd0239 carries prohibited 'Assisted-by: Claude:Sonnet-4.6' attribution trailer, violating the goal's commit convention; (2) signed benchmark source-label erratum (declared ListenBrainz vs actual Deezer). AC#1 substantially MET (erratum noted); AC#2/#4/#5/#6/#7 MET; AC#3 fails on both sub-gates. NEXT (do NOT tune on opened FINAL; do NOT consume another FINAL without DEV cross-validated generalization): (1) settle masking by a PRE-REGISTERED Deezer<->Last.fm independence proof before FINAL - if independent (it appears so), the decider MAY use unmasked direct edges (masking is what broke this run); (2) replace the 11-feature learned scorer with a pre-registered low-capacity (<=3 param) policy, weights frozen before open; (3) prove generalization on DEV via nested + SCENE-HELD-OUT CV (catch the metal-wins/pop--100% failure mode) requiring >=20% with a -10% per-scene floor BEFORE opening FINAL; (4) make the DECIDING retrieval gold SONIC (blind-reviewed multipositive soundalike sets, junk-deduped), keep Deezer/ListenBrainz taste-affinity as supporting, and repair the recurring sonic misses to >=16/20 on a DEV-adjacent held-out set first; (5) correct the provenance erratum in a fresh frozen protocol-v8 (keep both seals, single-open); (6) resolve the +921MB RSS before proposing the graph for serving; (7) only then open FINAL once, claiming the gain only on the axis the shipped mechanism addresses.

Most disciplined iteration to date; did essentially the entire iter-6 to-do list and reports an honest FAIL, independently verified. Builder correctly STOPPED before FINAL (final_open_count=0, fresh_final_created=false) because DEV preconditions failed. DECIDING AC#3 NOT MET: (a) aggregate DEV composite (0.80*nDCG@10 + 0.20*style_coherence@3) gain +13.2% (baseline 0.19461 -> challenger 0.22035) < 20% gate; nDCG alone gained +40% (0.03477->0.04882) but the 0.20*style term (baseline style ~0.83 near-ceiling, barely moves) structurally dilutes it; (b) scene-held-out CV floor BREACHED in 4 scenes (reggae -36.1%, classical -25.3%, african -13.6%, other -10.7%); only 4/17 folds pass the >=20%-and->=-10%-per-scene gate (pop +30.1, folk +26.6, rock +23.8, shoegaze +20.6); nested inner folds only 6-18.6%; (c) direct SONIC review 13/20 (65%) < 16/20 (80%) (fails direct-08/09/11/16/17/18/20), one better than iter-6's 12/20, content-hash-bound (1f0fcb07) to REAL 5-song challenger+production ranked lists, honest sonic-drift reasons (city-pop, Latin/French-R&B, generic-pop openers). INDEPENDENTLY VERIFIED all Builder claims: (1) PROVENANCE corrected - development-protocol.json corrected_provenance records the erratum (declared ListenBrainz vs actual Deezer 100/100), resolving iter-6 #4; Ed25519 seal verifies Good (byte-exact stdin); state/signer/allowed_signers/sig/protocol hashes all match; all 6 input-asset SHA-256 match; goal.md + protocol-v5/6/7 unmodified. (2) POLICY low-capacity - exactly 3 numeric params (audio_weight,style_weight,style_guard_min); score=G+aw*A+sw*S with fixed baked 0.7/0.3 and equal audio mean; read full ranker: SCENE-AGNOSTIC, no per-scene branch/manual boost/genre override anywhere; top3 style-guard is a NO-OP at the selected style_guard_min=0.0; fixed 27-point grid; selected (0.3,0.35,0.0) also used for the direct lists. (3) SOURCE INDEPENDENCE - id_isolation passed (no shared Deezer IDs enter training) legitimizing unmasked full edges, BUT Music4All<->Deezer learned-neighborhood overlap 82.4% (Last.fm<->Deezer 36.8%) => Deezer-nDCG stays SUPPORTING not deciding; graph_contract only_full=true, masks diagnostic-only never shipped. (4) COMPACT graph+resources - runtime graph catalog-artist-graph-full-v8.npz 18258 artists x96 neighbors float16/int16 ~11.4MB arrays (kills iter-6 +921MB RSS); peak RSS 1.493GB < internal 1.611GB and < conservative 2GB Hobby (654MB headroom); zero_errors/zero_fallbacks/deterministic; resident-target miss NON-BLOCKING+honest (core index alone exceeds target); caveat: 2GB tier is assumed (project_tier=unknown, unverified). (5) TESTS - independently ran quality gate: 459 passed 19.25s; pip_audit 0 vulns; secret scan 0 keys; build clean. (6) PRODUCTION UNCHANGED - live /api/stats = version 2026.07.11-dual-sonic64, library 272853; commit touches NO webapp/integrations/deploy/pyproject/requirements; no production module imports any catalog_* dev module; iteration7_deployed=false, nothing pushed/uploaded - correct no-deploy for FAIL. CV uses only ALREADY-OPENED v7 (100 recs; v7 FINAL burned in iter-6) + v6 pairs (190); no_unopened_final_labels_compared=true. INTEGRITY DEFECT (REPEAT): commit 56a06dd again carries prohibited 'Assisted-by: Claude:Sonnet-4.6' attribution trailer, same as iter-6 #5, violating the commit convention. AC#1/#2/#4/#5/#6/#7 MET; AC#3 fails on all DEV sub-gates; goal NOT achieved. ANALYSIS FOR NEXT: (A) a globally predeclared CONFIDENCE-GATED FALLBACK to current production is the right next direction and better than a global graph-first policy: falling back to dual_sonic where independent Music4All+Last.fm agreement AND style consistency are weak STRUCTURALLY protects the per-scene floor (abstain => challenger==baseline => 0% >= -10%) AND should also raise the sonic direct score (dual_sonic is pure-sonic and fixes the exact city-pop/Latin/hyperpop drifts). (B) such a gate CAN stay <=3 params (spend budget on agreement threshold tau + style threshold sigma + one audio tie-break, freezing G/A blends as constants) and CAN be CV'd without ID leakage via the existing nested+scene-held-out harness - BUT because of the 82% Music4All<->Deezer overlap the gate must be selected/gated on a SONIC gold, not Deezer-nDCG, and the 0.20*style composite likely needs revisiting since it caps composite gains. (C) DEV ACCEPTANCE before consuming a FRESH FINAL: pre-register frozen <=3-param gate (signed); nested-CV >=20% on sonic primary with CI excluding 0; scene-held-out EVERY scene >=-10% AND aggregate >=20%; direct SONIC >=16/20 blind+deduped repairing city-pop/Latin/hyperpop/digicore/Pixies->trip-hop; Deezer kept supporting with overlap disclosed; resource gate against the REAL verified hosted tier; THEN open ONE fresh FINAL, claim gain only on the sonic axis, no post-open ablation selection; only if it clears, wire desktop+hosted with parity tests and live-verify >=10 seeds before manifest/docs.
